Details: Create feature branches from main for each module modification
Each branch should only modify ONE module
Use develop branch for integration testing before main
Each commit should represent one logical change
Never combine changes from different modules in one commit
Use PR template with module checklist
Check only ONE module per PR
Update API docs if endpoints changed
Module owner must approve changes to their module
If affects other modules those owners review
All new code must have unit tests
Tests must mock other modules not import
Run full test suite before merge
Have rollback plan for each release
Use feature flags for major changes
Create proper fix in feature branch after
All tests must pass before merge
